tool.name: Map Tool - Cartographie de points géographiques
tool.description: Génère une carte statique de points géographiques avec clustering automatique ou manuel des populations

param.name: input_file
param.label: Upload your data
param.help: Data in tabular format containing at least one longitude one latitude column.

param.name: lon_col
param.label: The exact name of the column containing the longitudes

param.name: lat_col
param.label: The exact name of the column containing the latitudes

param.name: cluster_mode
param.label: Method of defining populations
param.help: Choose whether the populations are defined automatically using a geographical buffer or manually via a column in the file.
param.option: Manual: population column provided in the file

param.name: buffer_km
param.label: Buffer radius in kilometres
param.help: Two individuals whose buffers touch are considered to belong to the same population. Therefore, two individuals belong to the same population if they are separated by twice the buffer radius.

param.name: cluster_col
param.label: The exact name of the column containing the populations/clusters

param.name: view_mode_sel
param.label: Window definition mode
param.help: By default, the window is calculated automatically around your points.

param.name: view_countries
param.label: Countries (separated by commas)
param.help: Names in English or ISO-2/ISO-3 codes. Examples: France, Spain, Portugal or FR, ES, PT
